chapter_title.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

text: 4520 - وَ رَوَى اَلسَّكُونِيُّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ زَوْجِهَا فَلاَ نَفَقَةَ لَهَا حَتَّى تَرْجِعَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4520 - Al-Sakuni narrated from Jafar ibn Muhammad, from his father (as), who said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Any woman who leaves her house without her husband's permission has no right to maintenance until she returns."
